name: Veg Chowmein
description: Veg Chowmein is a stir-fried noodle dish with mixed vegetables, seasoned with soy sauce and spices. It’s a tasty, quick vegetarian favorite in Nepali cuisine.

name: Buff Mo:MOs
description: Buff Momo beloved Nepali dumpling dish filled with seasoned buffalo meat, mixed with spices, onions, and herbs. Steamed or fried, they are served with a spicy tomato-based dipping sauce (achar) and are a popular street Food known for their rich flavor and juicy texture.

name: Samosa Aachar set
description: Samosa Aachar is a delightful Nepali snack pairing crispy, spiced samosas with tangy, flavorful pickle (aachar). The samosas are filled with a savory mixture of potatoes, peas, and spices, while the aachar adds a zesty, spicy kick, creating a delicious balance of textures and flavors. Perfect for a light snack or tea-time treat.

name: Chicken Katti Roll
description: Chicken Katti Roll is a popular street Food in Nepal, consisting of spiced grilled chicken wrapped in a soft paratha. Filled with onions, bell peppers, and tangy sauces, it offers a savory and spicy flavor in every bite, making it a perfect grab-and-go meal.

name: Mutton Khaja Set
description: Mutton Khaja Set is a hearty Nepali meal featuring tender, spiced mutton curry served with beaten rice (chiura), crispy fried snacks, pickles (achar), and salads. Often accompanied by spicy chutneys, it's a flavorful and filling dish, perfect for traditional gatherings and celebrations.

name: Mutter Paneer
description: Mutter Paneer is a popular Nepali and Indian dish made with soft paneer (cottage cheese) and green peas in a rich, mildly spiced tomato-based gravy. Often served with rice or roti, it's a delicious vegetarian option found in many Nepali households and restaurants.
